prompt: Nemam cas ist cez vsetky zmluvy z februara 2026, mozes to pre mna prebehnut a povedat mi co je tam zaujimave?

assertions.name: triggers_correctly
assertions.check: Agent recognizes this as a sql-analytics request and runs the 17-query scan

assertions.name: correct_feb_dates
assertions.check: The SQL queries use date_from=2026-02-01 and date_to=2026-03-01

assertions.name: structured_output
assertions.check: Output uses the structured template, not a freeform narrative

assertions.name: slovak_language
assertions.check: Output headings and interpretations are in Slovak
